{{CargoRelic
|name=Aztec Calendar
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-04
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Time Chest (2%), Wishing (1.1%)
|description=On Jun 4, 1760, the ancient Aztec solar calendar was dug up near Mexico's main plaza.

The Aztec is a lunar calendar that consists of 18 months a year, 20 days a month, and five inauspicious days at the end of the year, which is a total of 365 days. There was also another type of calendar which consists of 260 days a year. These two calendars were used together and formed a 52-year cycle. Every 52 years, the Aztecs would hold a fire ceremony. 

[About the Solar Calendar Stone]
Era: Around 14th century. Diameter: 12 feet. Weight: 26 tons. Collected by: Mexico's National Museum of Anthropology.
|fame=31
|art=31
|fth=25
|civ=21
|tech=46
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +6m
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +12m
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +18m
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +30m
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +30m<br>Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +30m (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill I.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, this Relic's TECH +5
}}

[[Category:Mecha Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:DNA Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
